seoTitle: Leslie vs Lethebrook — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Leslie and Lethebrook. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Leslie and Lethebrook.
heading: Leslie vs Lethebrook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Leslie, Queensland and Lethebrook, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lethebrook has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Leslie (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Leslie or Lethebrook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Leslie has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Lethebrook scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Leslie scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Lethebrook scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Leslie or Lethebrook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lethebrook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
